Court Hill Park, 2825 Friendship St, Iowa City, IA 52245, USA

Various patches of pokeweed along both sides of trail throughout Court Park. Read up before consuming as mature leaves can make you sick, but the fresh young leaves/stems are eaten safely as a cooked green. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-August.
